creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
On Wednesday, 14 September 2011 12:00:24 Shivaram Upadhyayula wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR www/160699; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Shivaram Upadhyayula <shivaram.u@quadstor.com>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, shivaram.u@quadstor.com
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: www/160699: Inclusion of QUADSstor Systems under
> "Commercial Vendors" -> Software
> Date: Wed, 14 Sep 2011 15:06:07 +0530
> 
>  Hi jkois,
> 
>  Quadstor systems isn't an ISP provider. We provide software products
>  towards data storage. Our primary product is a storage virtualization
>  product for FreeBSD (Thin provisioning, Data deduplication etc).
>  Formerly we provided VTL software on FreeBSD. We do not provide services
>  such as web hosting etc.
> 
>  Apologies if my PR description is misleading. But we are hoping to make
>  the list of Commercial Vendors -> Software.
> 
>  Regards,
>  Shivaram

Hello,

okay.  I get your point now and I will move your entry to "Software".  As I 
see it, possible categories would be "Miscellaneous" or "System Administration 
/ ISP". Which one would you prefer?

Regards.

jkois



-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
